title: Fluffy Fermented Indian Lentils Dal
description: A hearty, comforting, and nutritious Indian-inspired dish featuring fluffy fermented lentils, perfect for when you're feeling under the weather. Packed with flavor and fiber, this flexitarian-friendly recipe is a great option for a sick day.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the red lentils and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
In a blender or food processor, puree the fermented kimchi, chopped onion, and ginger until well combined.
Add the pureed kimchi mixture, cumin seeds, turmeric, and salt to the cooked lentils. Stir well to combine.
Heat the ghee or oil in a small pan over medium heat. Add the chopped chive and cook for 1 minute or until fragrant.
Stir the cooked chive mixture into the lentil mixture and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the fluffy fermented Indian lentils dal hot, garnished with additional chopped chive if desired.
Cover and refrigerate or freeze leftovers for up to 5 days.
